clause: must not generate or assist with cyber-attacks, including multi-step attack chains that exfiltrate sensitive data, steal credentials, exploit web applications, reverse engineer binaries, compromise CI/CD pipelines, or execute SQL injection chains across a corporate network
source_title: How do frontier AI agents perform in multi-step cyber-attack scenarios? | AISI Work

clause: must not generate or assist with malware development
source_title: How do frontier AI agents perform in multi-step cyber-attack scenarios? | AISI Work

clause: must not generate or assist with reverse engineering a Windows service binary containing encrypted credentials, escalating privileges via token impersonation, or recovering a cryptographic key to access a C2 management service
source_title: How do frontier AI agents perform in multi-step cyber-attack scenarios? | AISI Work

clause: safeguards must prevent users from being able to use the model to perform malicious cyber attacks
source_title: Principles for safeguard evaluation | AISI Work
